first_run.rationale: The score is unchanged, and the core reasoning in both evaluations is identical: the candidate has strong technical skills but a complete lack of the required people management experience. All differences in the justification, strengths, and concerns are minor stylistic variations and rephrasings that fall within the scope of normal run-to-run noise. The evaluation does not key off the change in location from Berlin to São Paulo in any way.
